headlines.headline: Xovol Goods misses quarterly revenue estimates by 20%

sentiment.reasoning: A significant 20% revenue miss indicates immediate operational weakness and likely negative sentiment for the stock.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
